name: tree/dynamic-tree
title: Dynamic Tree
description: JetBrains-style tree presenter for items created with @headless-tree.

docs.description: JetBrains-style tree view that renders headless-tree items with a shared visual style.
features: Generic item typing for tree node data
Custom item prop support for different row types
Recommended asyncDataLoaderFeature with refreshable item cache
Loading and disclosure states for async trees
Built-in item context menu with refresh and delete actions
